issue_log.details: The 2023 manual prints a DIGIT tone legend and decodes example letter codes but no complete letter table; letter meanings beyond the printed examples are inferred and flagged.
Printed legend words are 'blue' and 'red-violet'; Ash/Mahogany added as conventional family names with the interpretation noted in rationales.
